violations.text: Whole milk, almond milk, cream, and hotdogs was observed held at 44-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All items that were held out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Units were adjusted to colder settings at the time of inspection. No TCS foods to be stored in units until foods are able to maintain an internal temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of orange residue. PIC informed to clean machines as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Working containers of spray bottles used for storing chemicals (Windex, all purpose cleaner) taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Employee marked the btls during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment needs test strips for Chloring Sanitizer. English Manual Warewashing and 3 Bay Sink Poster New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
